name: David's Cowboy Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Firmly packed dark brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. In a bowl with an electric mixer, cream together the butter and sugars until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition, and beat in vanilla extract.
4. Sift together flour, baking soda, baking powder, and salt into the bowl and beat until batter is combined well.
5. Stir in rolled oats and chocolate chips.
6. Drop batter by rounded tablespoons onto lightly buttered baking sheets.
7. Bake in the middle of the oven until golden, about 10 minutes.
